profiles.name: Juicy
profiles.subtitle: Pull early, finish in hold
profiles.rationale: Pull at 90.5 °C (~40% tenderness) — most juice, longest hold.

profiles.name: In between
profiles.subtitle: Midpoint of juicy & hotter pull
profiles.rationale: Pull ~92,8 °C — halfway between 90.5 and 95 °C, same 65.5 °C hold.

profiles.name: Hotter pull
profiles.subtitle: Classic done temp on the pit
profiles.rationale: Pull around 95 °C — more done on the pit, higher dryness risk in the model.
profiles.moistureRisk: High — classic “done” pull can ring out moisture at 95–96 °C (203–205 °F)

betweenNote: “In between” uses the midpoint between the juicy pull (90.5 °C) and hotter pull (95 °C), same hold box temp, and average shrink.
